Velea

A daily planner that reads your sky.

Not horoscopes. Your chart, today's transits, and the hour the light turns in your favor.

iPhone and web. One email when it opens.

You're on the list.

Timing is everything

You already know how to move. What's missing is when — and why.

Velea is a personalized timing system that helps you find yours. A blend of Vedic and Western astrology — not prediction, not a generalized horoscope. A practical tool for deciding what deserves your time now.

The name · from the Khmer
វេលាve-lea — time ល្អl'or — good វេលាល្អve-lea l'or — golden moment

Every act has its hour. Velea reads yours.

Read your day

Your chart, every morning.

Plain language. What today's sky is doing to your chart. What to do with it.

The golden hour

The hour the sky favors your move.

Velea reads the planetary hour against your chart and marks your វេលាល្អ Veleal'or — the hour to make the call, sign, or begin.

The day's capacity

The work, matched to what you actually have.

Tell Velea how you feel. It aligns tasks to today's capacity. When you're empty, it tells you to stop.

No good planets. No bad ones. Only what's live.
Read the sky as it is

Velea is almost here.

Be there for the first golden hour.
